key.name: show-background-notification
key.description: Whether to show a notification when MPRIS MiniPlayer starts hidden because no compatible media player is available.

key.name: start-on-login
key.description: Whether MPRIS MiniPlayer should create an XDG autostart desktop file and start automatically when the user logs in.

key.name: automatic-window-visibility
key.summary: Show and hide the window automatically
key.description: Whether MPRIS MiniPlayer should show the window when a compatible player appears and hide it when none remain.

key.name: compact-mode
key.description: Whether MPRIS MiniPlayer should use a smaller window layout.

key.name: show-status-indicator
key.description: Whether MPRIS MiniPlayer should show a status indicator when the desktop supports StatusNotifierItem indicators.
